Uses of Class
recoder.convenience.ASTIterator

Packages that use ASTIterator
Package
Description
recoder.convenience
The convenience layer contains auxiliary functions that are useful in the context of RECODER.

  • Uses of ASTIterator in recoder.convenience

    Methods in recoder.convenience with parameters of type ASTIterator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    ASTIteratorAdapter.enterChildNode(ASTIterator it, NonTerminalProgramElement thisNode, ProgramElement childNode)
     
    boolean
    ASTIteratorListener.enterChildNode(ASTIterator it, NonTerminalProgramElement thisNode, ProgramElement childNode)
    Determines whether or not a given child node should be visited.
    int
    ASTIteratorAdapter.enterChildren(ASTIterator it, NonTerminalProgramElement thisNode)
     
    int
    ASTIteratorListener.enterChildren(ASTIterator it, NonTerminalProgramElement thisNode)
    Called to determine whether or not children nodes should be visited.
    void
    ASTIteratorAdapter.enteringNode(ASTIterator it, ProgramElement node)
     
    void
    ASTIteratorListener.enteringNode(ASTIterator it, ProgramElement node)
    This method is called whenever an AST node is entered.
    void
    ASTIteratorAdapter.leavingNode(ASTIterator it, ProgramElement node)
     
    void
    ASTIteratorListener.leavingNode(ASTIterator it, ProgramElement node)
    This method is called just before an AST node is left.
    void
    ASTIteratorAdapter.returnedFromChildNode(ASTIterator it, NonTerminalProgramElement thisNode, ProgramElement childNode)
     
    void
    ASTIteratorListener.returnedFromChildNode(ASTIterator it, NonTerminalProgramElement thisNode, ProgramElement childNode)
    Called immediately after the iterator returned from the child node.
